headline: Prediction: ON Semiconductor Could Be 2026’s Big Tech Stock
summary: ON Semiconductor (NASDAQ:ON) has staged one of the most aggressive recoveries in the chip sector this year, and our proprietary model still sees room to run. After a vicious 2025 cyclical downturn, shares have rallied 137.56% year to date and now trade just shy of the 52-week high. Our 24/7 Wall St. price target for ...
